creator: ler@FreeBSD.org
text:
I have a cluster of 5 vm's using the vm-bhyve port to control them all running talos linux (https://www.talos.dev/v1.1/introduction/getting-started/) and every time I do an upgrade or something that requires a reboot, I either see bhyvectl destroy hang in D state, or the vm errors out, and in either case I need to reboot the host. 

What can I provide to help?
